fullName:
com.blockether.spel.bridge-test.`route-command!` is the CLI-side client: it POSTs one command to the bridge's
   /command endpoint and gets the browser's result back in daemon shape. This is
   exactly the path a regular `spel <verb>` follows once a target is saved..routes a command to a live tab and adapts the result
name:
`route-command!` is the CLI-side client: it POSTs one command to the bridge's
   /command endpoint and gets the browser's result back in daemon shape. This is
   exactly the path a regular `spel <verb>` follows once a target is saved. > routes a command to a live tab and adapts the result
